import yaml, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from pipeline.clients.token_manager import TokenManager
from pipeline.clients.central_client import CentralClient
from pipeline.clients.mcp_client import MCPClient

with open\("config/credentials.yaml"\) as f:
    creds = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

src = creds["source_account"]
tm = TokenManager\(
    client_id=src["client_id"],
    client_secret=src["client_secret"],
    cache_key="source",
\)
client = CentralClient\(base_url=src["base_url"], token_manager=tm\)
mcp = MCPClient\(client\)

serial = "SG30LMR164"

# Device inventory
device = mcp.get_device_by_serial\(serial\)
print\("=== DEVICE ==="\)
import json
print\(json.dumps\(device, indent=2\)\)

# Events
events = mcp.get_events\(serial, hours=24\)
print\(f"\\n=== EVENTS \(last 24h\): {len\(events\)} ==="\)
for e in events[:10]:
    print\(json.dumps\(e, indent=2\)\)
EOF)

import yaml, sys, json
sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from pipeline.clients.token_manager import TokenManager
from pipeline.clients.central_client import CentralClient

with open\("config/credentials.yaml"\) as f:
    creds = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

src = creds["source_account"]
tm = TokenManager\(client_id=src["client_id"], client_secret=src["client_secret"], cache_key="source"\)
client = CentralClient\(base_url=src["base_url"], token_manager=tm\)

site_id = "79244870000394240"

# Try clients endpoint
for endpoint in [
    "/network-monitoring/v1/clients",
    "/network-monitoring/v1alpha1/clients",
]:
    try:
        result = client.get\(endpoint, params={"siteId": site_id, "limit": 100}\)
        print\(f"=== {endpoint} ==="\)
        print\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2\)\)
        break
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"{endpoint} failed: {e}"\)

# Also try switch port/neighbor info
try:
    result = client.get\("/network-monitoring/v1/switches/SG30LMR164/ports"\)
    print\("\\n=== Switch Ports ==="\)
    print\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"\\nSwitch ports failed: {e}"\)
EOF)

Bash(.venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import yaml, sys, json
sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from pipeline.clients.token_manager import TokenManager
from pipeline.clients.central_client import CentralClient

with open\("config/credentials.yaml"\) as f:
    creds = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

src = creds["source_account"]
tm = TokenManager\(client_id=src["client_id"], client_secret=src["client_secret"], cache_key="source"\)
client = CentralClient\(base_url=src["base_url"], token_manager=tm\)

site_id = "79244870000394240"

result = client.get\("/network-monitoring/v1/clients", params={"siteId": site_id, "limit": 100}\)
clients = result.get\("items", []\)

print\(f"Total clients on site: {len\(clients\)}"\)
print\(\)

# Summarize by connected device
from collections import defaultdict
by_device = defaultdict\(list\)
for c in clients:
    by_device[c.get\("connectedDeviceSerial", "unknown"\)].append\(c\)

for serial, cl_list in sorted\(by_device.items\(\)\):
    device_type = cl_list[0].get\("connectedDeviceType", "?"\)
    print\(f"  {serial} \({device_type}\): {len\(cl_list\)} client\(s\)"\)

# Specifically check if any clients connect through the switch
print\(\)
switch_clients = [c for c in clients if c.get\("connectedDeviceSerial"\) == "SG30LMR164"]
print\(f"Clients directly on switch SG30LMR164: {len\(switch_clients\)}"\)

# Check which APs have clients
online_aps = ["PHSXM52029", "VNVQMPJ028", "USHBKD50J4", "PHQFKYJ7DH", "PHQHKZ22X5", "CNGTJ0TDT7"]
print\(\)
print\("AP client counts:"\)
for ap in online_aps:
    count = len\(by_device.get\(ap, []\)\)
    print\(f"  {ap}: {count}"\)
EOF)

Bash(.venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import yaml, sys, json
sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from pipeline.clients.token_manager import TokenManager
from pipeline.clients.central_client import CentralClient

with open\("config/credentials.yaml"\) as f:
    creds = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

src = creds["source_account"]
tm = TokenManager\(client_id=src["client_id"], client_secret=src["client_secret"], cache_key="source"\)
client = CentralClient\(base_url=src["base_url"], token_manager=tm\)

site_id = "79244870000394240"

# Alerts for site
try:
    result = client.get\("/network-notifications/v1/alerts", params={"status": "Active", "siteId": site_id}\)
    alerts = result.get\("alerts", result.get\("items", []\)\)
    print\(f"Active alerts on site: {len\(alerts\)}"\)
    for a in alerts:
        print\(f"  [{a.get\('severity'\)}] {a.get\('deviceSerial',''\)} — {a.get\('alertType', a.get\('description',''\)\)}"\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"Alerts failed: {e}"\)

# Try to get AP-specific monitoring detail for Off_655
try:
    result = client.get\("/network-monitoring/v1/access-points/PHQHKZ22X5"\)
    print\("\\n=== Off_655 \(PHQHKZ22X5\) detail ==="\)
    print\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"\\nAP detail failed: {e}"\)

# Try radios
try:
    result = client.get\("/network-monitoring/v1/access-points/PHQHKZ22X5/radios"\)
    print\("\\n=== Off_655 radios ==="\)
    print\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"\\nRadios failed: {e}"\)
EOF)

Bash(.venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import yaml, sys, json
sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from pipeline.clients.token_manager import TokenManager
from pipeline.clients.central_client import CentralClient

with open\("config/credentials.yaml"\) as f:
    creds = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

src = creds["source_account"]
tm = TokenManager\(client_id=src["client_id"], client_secret=src["client_secret"], cache_key="source"\)
client = CentralClient\(base_url=src["base_url"], token_manager=tm\)

# Get the real arubaAP policy to see correct structure
try:
    # Try fetching by the PAP name directly
    for name in ["sys_policy_pap_arubaAP", "arubaAP"]:
        r = client.get\(f"/network-config/v1/policies/{name}"\)
        print\(f"=== {name} ==="\)
        print\(json.dumps\(r, indent=2\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"failed: {e}"\)

# Also list all roles to see if normalDevice might have partial state
try:
    r = client.get\("/network-config/v1/roles"\)
    roles = r.get\("items", r.get\("roles", []\)\)
    names = [x.get\("name"\) for x in roles] if isinstance\(roles, list\) else list\(r.keys\(\)\)
    print\(f"\\nExisting roles: {names}"\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"\\nroles list: {e}"\)
EOF)

Bash(.venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import yaml, sys, json
sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from pipeline.clients.token_manager import TokenManager
from pipeline.clients.central_client import CentralClient

with open\("config/credentials.yaml"\) as f:
    creds = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

src = creds["source_account"]
tm = TokenManager\(client_id=src["client_id"], client_secret=src["client_secret"], cache_key="source"\)
client = CentralClient\(base_url=src["base_url"], token_manager=tm\)

# Try different policy type values
for policy_type in ["Local", "local", "POLICY_TYPE_LOCAL", "ACCESS"]:
    try:
        r = client.post\("/network-config/v1/policies/test_delete_me", data={
            "name": "test_delete_me",
            "type": policy_type,
            "rules": [{"sequence": 10, "class": "any", "class-type": "ipv4", "action": "permit"}]
        }\)
        print\(f"type='{policy_type}': SUCCESS — {r}"\)
        break
    except Exception as e:
        resp = getattr\(getattr\(e, "response", None\), "text", ""\)
        print\(f"type='{policy_type}': {resp[:150]}"\)

# Also check what the role schema accepts - try without policy field
try:
    r = client.post\("/network-config/v1/roles/normalDevice", data={
        "name": "normalDevice",
        "description": "Normal device — access VLAN 200, allow all",
        "vlan-parameters": {"wired-access-vlan-id": 200},
        "session-parameters": {
            "auth-mode": "DEVICE_MODE",
            "stp-admin-edge-port": True,
            "poe-priority": "LOW",
            "tunneled-node-server-redirect": False,
        },
    }\)
    print\(f"\\nRole without policy: SUCCESS — {r}"\)
except Exception as e:
    resp = getattr\(getattr\(e, "response", None\), "text", ""\)
    print\(f"\\nRole without policy: {resp[:200]}"\)
EOF)

Bash(.venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import yaml, sys, json
sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from pipeline.clients.token_manager import TokenManager
from pipeline.clients.central_client import CentralClient

with open\("config/credentials.yaml"\) as f:
    creds = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

src = creds["source_account"]
tm = TokenManager\(client_id=src["client_id"], client_secret=src["client_secret"], cache_key="source"\)
client = CentralClient\(base_url=src["base_url"], token_manager=tm\)

# Try the PAP \(port-access-policy\) endpoint with v1alpha1
for endpoint, body in [
    \("/network-config/v1alpha1/policies/sys_policy_pap_normalDevice", {
        "name": "sys_policy_pap_normalDevice",
        "type": "LOCAL",
        "rules": [
            {"sequence": 10, "class": "sys_pap_normalDevice_ip_allow_1",  "class-type": "ipv4", "action": "permit"},
            {"sequence": 20, "class": "sys_pap_normalDevice_ipv6_allow_1","class-type": "ipv6", "action": "permit"},
        ]
    }\),
    \("/network-config/v1/port-access-policies/sys_policy_pap_normalDevice", {
        "name": "sys_policy_pap_normalDevice",
        "rules": [
            {"sequence": 10, "action": "permit", "class-type": "ipv4"},
            {"sequence": 20, "action": "permit", "class-type": "ipv6"},
        ]
    }\),
]:
    try:
        r = client.post\(endpoint, data=body\)
        print\(f"{endpoint}: SUCCESS — {r}"\)
    except Exception as e:
        resp = getattr\(getattr\(e, "response", None\), "text", ""\)
        print\(f"{endpoint}: {resp[:300]}"\)
EOF)
